docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAN, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA. KING OF FURNITURE + MATTRESS $760.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $760.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $970.00 FILED BY CAN, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA. KING OF FURNITURE + MATTRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAN, MIGUEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MURIEL FALAK. NO COSTS, PLAINTIFF HAS FILED AN IFP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, HUYEN DBA. KING OF FURNITURE + MATTRESS
